federation.note: M1 of the legacy-interop path (full-solid-ecosystem#20 / agentic-solid-vision LEGACY-INTEROP.md): the FROM-email path to the accountable web of agents. A four-rung ratchet composing the suite's hardened packages: (1) a hostile-input-hardened in-house RFC 5322/MIME parser -> a schema:Person/foaf:Person sender node (candidate-vs-verified WebID, never assumed from an unauthenticated address) + a PROV-anchored agentic:RawInboundMessage (raw bytes stored byte-exact + sha256 digest); (2) an injectable Interpreter seam (hermetic deterministic reference: meeting-time/relative-date/yes-no extraction; live LLM via solid-a2a parseIntent is M2) emitting per-datum reliability as reified PROV qualified derivations (agentic:confidence + calibration + method + the interpreting agent's ODRL mandate), gated by classifyReliability (threshold/human-confirm/always-human-confirm for the security tail); (3) a structured signable reply carrier (inline JSON-LD signable as a solid-vc VC over the RDFC-1.0 canonical graph via an injectable sign seam + multipart/alternative part + X-Agentic-Reply header + onboarding link); (4) pure channel-upgrade negotiation (rdf>dpop-sk>a2a>email, fail-closed on a security-bearing required step). Persistence is owner-private (fail-closed owner-only WAC ACL written first). One minted namespace only (https://w3id.org/jeswr/agentic#) for the reliability annotation + raw-message anchor; everything else reuses PROV/schema.org/dct/vcard/foaf/acl. RDF via n3.Writer + typed quads, never hand-built; solid-chat-interop typed serialisers for the CanonicalMessage. ignore-scripts=true; committed self-contained dist (GitHub-installable). The entire email input is untrusted; parse/hardening exhaustively tested (header injection, oversized/nested parts, malformed encodings, RDF/ACL/JSON-in-script injection). npm publish deferred (needs:user); agentic: w3id redirect = needs:user. M2 = Slack/Matrix channels + live LLM interpreter + solid-vc signer + inbound-webhook service.
